name: Arimoclomol NPC phase 2/3 trial
summary: A 12-month randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of arimoclomol for neurological progression in Niemann-Pick disease type C.
population: Children and adolescents with molecularly confirmed Niemann-Pick disease type C, many receiving background miglustat

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Chaperone and Heat-Shock Support because they can show whether the intervention changes function, safety, and regulatory status in Children and adolescents with molecularly confirmed Niemann-Pick disease type C, many receiving background miglustat. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
